exercises.code:
import tempfile
from pathlib import Path
with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile('w+', delete=False, encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write('ok')
    path = f.name
print(Path(path).read_text(encoding='utf-8').strip())
exercises.note: Theory now teaches NamedTemporaryFile('w+', delete=False, encoding='utf-8'): write, f.name, Path(path).read_text(...).strip().
